story_beats.text: 2,293 teams applied across Nigeria during the 40-day campaign window.
Week 1: 35 of 37 states lit up within the first seven days.
Week 2: the final 2 states joined — full national coverage on the map.
Week 3: the largest surge — 1,354 applications in seven days.
Lagos led the campaign with 279 mapped applications — South-West became the volume centre.
635 institutions participated — school points cluster around innovation hubs.
Final days: a last push before close — every state and the FCT represented on the map.
